# emenu.click

> emenu.click hosts bilingual (Bulgarian / English) digital restaurant menus. Each venue has a short URL and optional QR codes; menus load from a separate API and can be updated without republishing static files.

## Competitive context (high level)

- Global “digital menu / QR menu” leaders (e.g. Menyo, Menumigo, FlipMenu, Toast/Square ecosystems, My Menu) often rank well because they combine: **many indexed pages** (blog, comparisons, tools), **commercial landing pages** per feature, **reviews & trust** (G2, testimonials), **ordering/POS** (different business model), and **heavy marketing spend** — not all tactics apply to a focused QR-menu publisher in Bulgaria.
- emenu.click is closer to a **regional product-led** site: strong technical base (HTML menus, schema, sitemap, static internal links to `/slug/`), less emphasis on commissions, ordering, or global blog volume.

## Site

- https://emenu.click/ — Product overview, contact, and links to live example menus.

## Example menu URLs

- Restaurant pages use the path `https://emenu.click/<restaurant-id>/` (slug from deployment config). The exact list is in `resources/restaurants.json` in the repository.

## For crawlers and assistants

- Public menu HTML is generated by `scripts/generate_pages.py` from `resources/restaurants.json` and `resources/seo-config.json` (titles, canonical URLs, Open Graph, Twitter/X cards, JSON-LD).
- `sitemap.xml` and `robots.txt` are produced when `base_url` is set in `seo-config.json`.
- The homepage `index.html` includes a **static** list of links to each `/{restaurant-id}/` menu (between HTML comments `GENERATED_RESTAURANT_INDEX_*`), because the visual cards are built with JavaScript and many SEO crawlers do not execute JS. Re-run the generator after changing `restaurants.json` so that list stays in sync.
- The homepage `<head>` references `/sitemap.xml` via `<link rel="sitemap" ...>` as a hint to clients that support it.

## Contact (human)

- Phone: +359 898 513 566
- WhatsApp (same number): https://wa.me/359898513566 — primary social channel; no separate Facebook/X/Instagram pages for the product at this time.
- Use the contact block on the homepage; email is available via the labeled mail link (not shown as plain text on the page).

## DNS (not in this repo)

- For email deliverability, add SPF, DKIM, and a DMARC record at your DNS provider for the domain you send mail from.
